# Cladribine 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Cladribine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Cladribine</strong> 目前有 <strong>39 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Cladribine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Litak is indicated for the treatment of hairy-cell leukaemia.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（99.8%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>liver sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis（99.5%）</li>
<li>skeletal muscle neoplasm（99.0%）</li>
<li>gestational trophoblastic neoplasm（98.4%）</li>
<li>pleural adenomatoid tumor（98.1%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>partial hydatidiform mole（98.0%）</li>
<li>gestational uterine corpus choriocarcinoma（97.9%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（97.9%）</li>
<li>pleural biphasic mesothelioma（97.8%）</li>
<li>malignant peritoneal mesothelioma（97.8%）</li>
<li>hydatidiform mole, recurrent（97.7%）</li>
<li>fallopian tube gestational choriocarcinoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>pleural epithelioid mesothelioma（97.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/cladribine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
